Seminars

CeDEx China runs a regular Brown Bag seminar series during teaching semesters (typically 12:30–14:00).

2026
8 Apr
Law and Norms in Multicultural Societies
Dr Tom Lane · Newcastle Business School
28 Jan
Self-Commitment for Cooperation
Professor Jaimie W. Lien · Shandong University
28 Jan
Strategic Commitment and Legal Enforcement in Dynamic Matching
Professor Jie Zheng · Shandong University
2025
19 Nov
Entry Deterrence Through Strategic Trading
Dr Xiaoqi Xu · Southwestern University of Finance and Economics
12 Nov
Form vs Information: The Regimes of Data Property Rights
Mr Bozhong Zheng · Tsinghua University
5 Nov
Beyond Lost Earnings: Job Displacement and the Cost of Commuting
Dr Yige Duan · Shanghai Jiao Tong University
